evals.prompt: Проверь текст: Мы прийдём завтра на встречу чтобы обсудить новые предложения
evals.expected_output: Autocorrection via API v2: corrected text with grammar and punctuation fixes, detailed mode showing errors
expectations: The agent checks for TEXTOVOD_API2_TOKEN env var before making API calls
The agent uses curl to call the Textovod API v2 grammar endpoint
The agent uses jq -n --arg to safely build JSON body (not string interpolation)
The agent does NOT send an 'id' field in the v2 submit request body
The agent polls the result endpoint after submitting
The output shows the corrected text with 'прийдём' fixed
The output shows the comma added before 'чтобы'
The output uses detailed mode format with error list and corrected text

evals.prompt: Проверь орфографию: Он расчитывал на лутшее но получилось совсем подругому
evals.expected_output: Spelling check via API v1: list of misspelled words with suggestions, using spelling endpoint
expectations: The agent checks for TEXTOVOD_USER_ID and TEXTOVOD_API_KEY env vars
The agent uses the v1 spelling endpoint (spelling/user/add), not v2 grammar
The agent uses jq -n --arg to safely build JSON body
The agent correctly parses the result field as a JSON string (using fromjson or equivalent)
The output identifies 'расчитывал' as a spelling error
The output identifies 'лутшее' as a spelling error
The output uses detailed mode showing individual errors with suggestions

evals.prompt: Просто исправь: В этом тексте есть нескольно ошибок которые нужно исправить чтобы он выглядил нормально
evals.expected_output: Quick mode autocorrection: just the corrected text with error count, no detailed error list
expectations: The agent uses API v2 grammar (autocorrection) as default
The agent recognizes 'просто исправь' as quick mode trigger
The output uses quick mode format: error count + corrected text only
The output does NOT show a detailed error list (no numbered error items)
The corrected text fixes 'нескольно' to 'несколько'
The corrected text fixes 'выглядил' to 'выглядел'
